working_on: Refactor engine/tools/health_check.py to emit ADR 0057 TEMPLATE.md shape (close Issue #53). Add 11 per-section emit_*() functions; rewire render_report(); update tests; amend ADR 0057 Consequences in-place. audit_*() data-gathering functions stay unchanged.
outcome_summary: Closed Issue #53 — health_check.py ADR 0057 TEMPLATE.md shape refactor (S-0097 audit Non-obvious finding B). Two commits beyond eager-claim: code refactor + tests (commit 938f222) + ADR 0057 Consequences amendment (commit 6c2039f). 11 per-section emit_*() functions added in TEMPLATE.md order producing the canonical 14-body-section adversarial-stance shape; render_report() rewired as thin chain; render_section() helper unchanged. audit_*() data-gathering functions untouched per Issue #53 scope; S-0099 audit_orphan_ok_list and audit_mempalace content-prefix matching flow through unchanged. emit_user_adjudication left blank-on-arrival per ADR 0057 element 1. emit_infrastructure_without_function carries header rename (Dead weight → Infrastructure-without-function). 20 new per-emitter unit tests + 1 updated structure test + 1 renamed/rewritten mempalace section test; 1075 pytests pass (was 1055). Validator: 0 hard-fails; soft-warns 374 (matches eager-claim baseline; no regression). Layer 3 cold-context review per ADR 0038 returned zero contract-vs-code drift. ADR 0057 Consequences amended in-place per ADR 0036 amendment asymmetry (refinement, not posture change). MemPalace decision drawer at paideia/decisions/drawer_paideia_decisions_34cddd43a57c4b5651acbf32.

Phase: NA-engine-discipline.
